title: carex viridula subsp. pulchella
intro: Carex viridula subsp. pulchella, also known as the green sedge or pulchella sedge, is a species of flowering plant in the sedge family (Cyperaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Carex viridula subsp. pulchella include its anti-inflammatory and antipyretic properties, which can help to reduce pain and alleviate symptoms of various ailments. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects on human health.
